summary: The diff only modifies a project_state.json metadata file, marking the feature request as 'pending'. No actual implementation changes were made to the codebase — no frontend, backend, or configuration files were added or modified to fulfill REQ-1.

missing_requirements.requirement: Enquiry form accepts and validates user input, backend canister records the enquiry, browser opens WhatsApp link to +91 8431628989, all sections render correctly, and the site is accessible in a deployed environment.
missing_requirements.reason: No implementation files were changed. The only modified file is project_state.json which marks the feature as 'pending' — no form logic, backend Motoko code, WhatsApp integration, section components, or deployment configuration was added or updated.
